G0.label:
case cons
β : Type u_1
γ : Type u_2
α : Type u_3
g : β → List γ
f : α → β
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : flatMap g (map f tail✝) = flatMap (fun a => g (f a)) tail✝
⊢ flatMap g (map f (head✝ :: tail✝)) = flatMap (fun a => g (f a)) (head✝ :: tail✝)

G1.label:
β : Type u_1
γ : Type u_2
α : Type u_3
g : β → List γ
f : α → β
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : flatMap g (map f tail) = flatMap (fun a => g (f a)) tail
⊢ flatMap g (map f (head :: tail)) = flatMap (fun a => g (f a)) (head :: tail)
